prompt: A high-end photorealistic lifestyle shot from a first-person perspective inside a modern car at night. A hand holds a sleek smartphone, taking a photo of a delicious, gourmet French-dog and a pastry sitting on a clean wooden dashboard tray. Hovering above the food is a subtle, translucent holographic interface with glowing teal and blue lines, displaying abstract data visualizations and nutrition charts (no text). The background shows a blurred, cinematic gas station at night with soft neon teal and orange ambient lighting. Premium lighting, 8k resolution, cinematic composition, sharp focus on the food and phone screen.
negative_prompt: text, letters, numbers, watermark, logo, QR code, readable UI, distorted fingers, extra digits, blurry face, low quality, cartoon, illustration, messy car interior, bright daylight.
notes: Used a first-person POV to mimic the user action described in the post (taking a photo of the snack).
Balanced the 'road trip' theme with the brand's premium cyberpunk aesthetic using holographic overlays.
Specified teal and blue glows to match the FoodFlow brand identity seen in the references.
Ensured the interface is 'abstract' to avoid the AI generating gibberish text or numbers which breaks the 'no readable text' rule.
